title: Settings

account.anonymousBody: Continue with phone or email to keep your campaigns when you switch devices.

instagram.connectFailed: Couldn't connect Instagram. Please try again.

connectPage.heading: Connect Instagram to post directly
connectPage.sub: Once connected, you can post your AI-generated campaign images and captions directly from BriefAI — no copy-paste needed.
connectPage.benefit1: Post campaign images directly from BriefAI
connectPage.benefit2: Share your WhatsApp message to Instagram Stories
connectPage.benefit3: Reach more customers without leaving the app

privacyBody: BriefAI stores your campaign answers and generated content to show you your campaign history. Your data is not shared with third parties.
startFreshConfirmBody: This will clear your draft, language preference, and demo progress on this device. Your saved campaigns are not deleted.
